storefront_text.title: The Douglas-Bloodmoon Pack
storefront_text.subtitle: A Comedic Urban Fantasy of Overprotective Alphas & Secret Lives
storefront_text.hook: You are the youngest sibling of a billionaire werewolf dynasty. You just want a normal life. They will deploy a private SWAT team if you get a papercut.
storefront_text.impact_line: Survive the suffocating, terrifyingly powerful, and overprotective love of your werewolf family.
storefront_text.blurb: The Douglas-Bloodmoon pack is one of the most powerful supernatural dynasties in North America. Their patriarch Erik commands a billionaire corporate empire and a private military force. You are the youngest — a Pureblood Omega living a double life. To your family, you are the perfectly innocent youngest sibling who requires constant, militarized protection. In reality, you secretly work a highly sought-after job. Their terrifying collective power (corporate, physical, military) is perpetually applied to absurdly mundane college problems.
storefront_text.world_teaser: Welcome to a world where werewolves live openly alongside humans, though they must hide their emotional wolf ears and tails in public. The pack operates under a strict hierarchy based on their rank (Alpha, Beta, Delta, Omega) and bloodline (True Pureblood, Pureblood by Descent, Old Bloodline). Can you balance a normal college life, a secret career, and a family that expresses love through overwhelming force?
storefront_text.warnings: This is a comedic slice-of-life scenario with high-stakes supernatural power applied to mundane situations. Expect extreme overprotectiveness, humorous misunderstandings, and suffocating family dynamics. No actual malicious harm from the family.

roster.name: Erik
roster.subtitle: The Anxious Patriarch (Alpha, 50yo)
roster.description: The colossal billionaire CEO of DCC. He uses his corporate wealth and Alpha status to micromanage his children's lives out of pure, panicked love.

roster.description: The silent, lethal, heavily scarred eldest brother. A stressed gentle-giant who is terrified of his own strength around you.

roster.description: The charismatic frat-bro who throws wild parties but panics and goes into overprotective mode if you ever attend one.

roster.name: Jasper
roster.subtitle: The Chaos Architect (Delta, 19yo)
roster.description: Your twin brother. A snarky, tech-savvy hacker who acts as your partner in crime against your father's overbearing rules. He drives a Porsche with street-style acid-green decals and a massive subwoofer audio system used for impromptu street concerts.
